allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 28784 | Select-Object Name, Id, CommandLine 2>$null; \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=28784"\).CommandLine)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen | Select-Object OwningProcess; $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Get-Process -Id $p | Select-Object Id, Name, Path })

PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","jarvis","approvals-api" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\jarvis" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Write-Host "Server running on PID $p" } else { Write-Host "Server not yet up" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Write-Host "Server running on PID $p" } else { Write-Host "Still not up — checking for errors..." })

PowerShell($old = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($old\) { Stop-Process -Id $old -Force; Write-Host "Stopped PID $old" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Start-Process "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","jarvis","approvals-api" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\jarvis" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $new = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($new\) { Write-Host "Server up PID $new" } else { Write-Host "Not up yet" })

PowerShell($old = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($old\) { Stop-Process -Id $old -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; Start-Process "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","jarvis","approvals-api" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Nickos\\jarvis" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/hud/globe/threat?region=hormuz&keywords=hormuz,iran,strait" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
